popularStory.headline: Renaud II de Clermont (1075-1152)
popularStory.description:
Renaud II de Clermont, né vers 1075, mort vers 1152, fut comte de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis à partir de 1101. Il était fils d'Hugues Ier, comte de Clermont, et de Marguerite de Roucy.

Il fut marié en pr …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud de Clermont II於1081年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特時，他的父親Hugh de Clermont51歲，母親Marguerite Roucy36歲。他於1103年與Adélaïde de Vermandois結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年在他的家鄉享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud de Clermont II于1081年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特时，他的父亲Hugh de Clermont51岁，母亲Marguerite Roucy36岁。他于1103年与Adélaïde de Vermandois结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年在他的家乡享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud de Clermont II was born in 1081, in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Hugh de Clermont, was 51 and his mother, Marguerite Roucy, was 36. He married Adélaïde de Vermandois in 1103. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1162, in his hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud de Clermont II est né en 1081, à Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Hugh de Clermont, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Roucy, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Adélaïde de Vermandois en 1103. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1162, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud de Clermont II 1081 in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Clermont 51 und seine Mutter Marguerite Roucy 36. Er hat 1103 Adélaïde de Vermandois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1162 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Clermont II è nato il nel 1081 nel Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Clermont, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite Roucy, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Adélaïde de Vermandois nel 1103. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1162, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud de Clermont IIが1081年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Hugh de Clermontは51歳，母Marguerite Roucyは36歳であった。1103年にAdélaïde de Vermandoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年に故郷で81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud de Clermont II(이)가 1081년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Clermont(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite Roucy(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1103년 Adélaïde de Vermandois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Clermont II nasceu em 1081, em Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugh de Clermont, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Roucy, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Adélaïde de Vermandois em 1103. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1162, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud de Clermont II родился в 1081 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Clermont было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Roucy, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Adélaïde de Vermandois в 1103 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1162 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud de Clermont II nació en 1081, en Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Clermont, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Marguerite Roucy, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Adélaïde de Vermandois en 1103. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1162, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años.
